description_long: This hatchback car features a streamlined, modern design with a gently sloping roofline and a compact, urban-friendly profile. The body is predominantly white with black-tinted windows and a black roof section, giving it a sleek, two-tone appearance. The car has four passenger doors and a rear hatch door, with subtle sculpting along the sides and integrated door handles. The wheels are five-spoke alloys, and the front and rear lights are narrow and angular, contributing to its contemporary aesthetic. The front grille is minimalistic, with a wide lower intake and no visible manufacturer badge. The overall build suggests a lightweight, efficient vehicle suitable for city driving.
description: A modern, white hatchback car with black-tinted windows, four doors, and a rear hatch, featuring sleek lines and alloy wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the car, four doors, and the sloping roofline.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rear hatch door, taillights, and the absence of a visible license plate.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing four doors and the car's compact profile.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the minimalistic grille, headlights, and windshield.
